# 🚧 `/site/` is the Factory Agent's workspace

**Students: do not edit any file in this folder.** This folder is owned by the Factory Agent — the AI you'll see on the big screen.

The Factory Agent reads everything you write to `/contributions/<your-role>/`, makes design decisions, and stitches the live FirstGen microsite together here. You'll see it happening live on the screen.

If you want to influence what's in here:
- **Software Developers** — write HTML/CSS proposals + ideas into your contributions folder. The Agent will use them.
- **Visual Designers** — drop images into your contributions folder. The Agent will reference them.
- **Copywriters** — drop copy. The Agent will slot it in.
- **Pitch Lead** — drop your pitch. You'll present it live at minute 50.
- **Accessibility Champion** — drop your audit + fixes. The Agent will apply them.
- **Researcher** — drop verified stats. Copywriters and the Agent will use them.
- **Project Coordinator** — drop the team plan. The Agent uses it as the brief.

That's the whole loop. You write to your folder. The Factory Agent builds the site. You watch it happen.

---

The starting `index.html` and `styles.css` here are just a seed — the Factory Agent will reshape both as your team's work lands.
